question_html: He can’t drive and _____.
We got our internet connection _____. Fill in the blank with the appropriate verb.
She insists that he _____ for dinner.
You liked flowers ______.
Which of the following sentences is correct? If you heat water to 100 degrees, _____.
I have the copy _____.
They had the roof ____ after the storm.
Had I been a child again, ______.
He is a movie lover and ______.
Which of the following is not a causative verb?
The job requires applicants _____ a degree.
Had I the wings of a bird _______.
options_html: I would have flown in the sky
I would fly in the sky
I will fly in the sky
correct_answer_html: I would fly in the sky
